compiled_state.title: Mechanical classification exclusion in fix-bug SKILL.md should be config-driven, not hardcoded directory list
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What happened

The fix for f1ed-d7c8 added a hardcoded exclusion: 'files in skills/, agents/, or prompts/ directories must not be classified as mechanical.' This works for the DSO plugin structure but is brittle — a host project might have LLM-behavioral files in different directories (e.g., .claude/prompts/, config/agents/, custom-skills/).

## Fix needed

Add a config key (e.g., paths.llm_behavioral_dirs) in dso-config.conf that lists directories whose files should never be classified as mechanical. The fix-bug SKILL.md exclusion should reference this config key rather than hardcoding skills/, agents/, prompts/. Default value: skills,agents,prompts (preserving current behavior).

comments.body: Behavioral assertion (Step 5 LLM exemption): After fix, fix-bug SKILL.md mechanical exclusion MUST reference a config key (e.g., fix_bug.llm_behavioral_dirs) instead of hardcoded 'skills/, agents/, prompts/'. Grep for config key reference in exclusion section.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
